'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=WIZ5cqEAM0FDXBdVITiafxVpOkTXAmti1nKLy8UDiw4-1773358871-1.0.1.1-W8EtPWTVU4zWIGMStwuuRrsaV7nIHuYFOnSE.p93QlM"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
